this_week.name: Run The Wade 2026
this_week.description: A running challenge event organized by Jones' Fitness in Biggleswade on Sunday 24th May 2026. Participants can choose from multiple running challenges to suit their fitness level.

this_week.name: Castle Comedy Biggleswade - May Special
this_week.address: The BIGG Theatre, 36 High Street, Biggleswade, SG18 0JL
this_week.description: Castle Comedy brings top UK stand-up comedians to The BIGG Theatre in Biggleswade. Doors open at 6:45pm with performances starting at 7:30pm, featuring the finest acts on the UK comedy circuit.

this_week.name: Craft Fair
this_week.description: A craft fair at Trinity Methodist Church featuring stalls and refreshments. Free entry from 10:00am to 3:00pm with local crafters and vendors selling handmade goods.

this_week.name: Wings & Wheels Air Show
this_week.address: The Shuttleworth Collection, Alder Drive, Biggleswade, SG18 9DT
this_week.description: The Shuttleworth Collection hosts the Wings & Wheels Air Show featuring historic aircraft and vehicles. A perfect showcase of the collection's unique airworthy planes and vintage cars.

this_week.name: Biggleswade Flea Market
this_week.description: The Biggleswade Flea Market returns to Market Square from 8:00am to 3:00pm featuring furniture, collectibles, and vintage goods. A free entry event for treasure hunters and bargain seekers.

this_week.name: Twelfth Night
this_week.address: The BIGG Theatre, 36 High Street, Biggleswade, SG18 0JL
this_week.description: Biggleswade Arts and Theatre Society (BATS) proudly presents Shakespeare's Twelfth Night at The BIGG Theatre. A fast-moving, high-energy production set in a post-apocalyptic Illyria featuring mistaken identities, romance, and comedy, running 11–14 June with an additional matinee on Saturday.

this_week.name: Quiz Night
this_week.address: The Rose, 75 High Street, Old Town, Biggleswade, SG18 0JH
this_week.description: A general knowledge comedy quiz night at The Rose pub in Biggleswade on Tuesday 26th May at 7pm. Join teams for an evening of trivia and laughs at this popular local music venue.

this_week.name: Comedy Night
this_week.address: The Rose, 75 High Street, Old Town, Biggleswade, SG18 0JH
this_week.description: The Rose pub hosts a comedy night on Sunday 14th June featuring some of the finest comics on the UK circuit. Line-up to be revealed, with performances showcasing established and up-and-coming stand-up talent.

this_week.name: The Bigg Eats
this_week.description: The Bigg Eats returns to Biggleswade Market Square on Thursday 28th May from 4–9pm with music and vibes. A family-friendly opening time of 4pm gives early arrivals first choice of food vendors and entertainment.

on_sale.name: An Evening with Charlie Beech (The Biggleswade Weekend)
Summer Concert – Old World New World
on_sale.blurb: Biggleswade & District Choral Society presents a summer concert at St Andrew's Church. Tickets are available for purchase from the society's website.

on_sale.name: The BIGG Community Concert with East Bedfordshire Chamber Choir
on_sale.address: The BIGG Theatre, 36 High Street, Biggleswade, SG18 0JL
on_sale.blurb: A community concert featuring East Bedfordshire Chamber Choir at The BIGG Theatre. Tickets are available for purchase from the venue's website.
